meta.note: Talent points: 1/level from 10..60 (51). Tree tier N unlocks at 5*(N-1) spent in-tree; capstone (tier 7) needs 30 in-tree +1.

talents.desc: On hit taken (10%/rank): attacker slowed 30%, 2s. ICD 2s.

talents.name: Thunder Weight
talents.desc: Stormbolt +6% damage per rank.

talents.name: Storm Sight
talents.desc: +1% crit chance per rank.

talents.name: Far Front
talents.desc: Stormbolt +20 cast range per rank (200->240px).

talents.name: Grounded Prey
talents.desc: +2%/rank damage vs slowed/rooted targets.

talents.name: Rolling Thunder
talents.desc: On Stormbolt hit (50%/rank): reset Gale cooldown. ICD 4s.

talents.name: Tempest Momentum
talents.desc: On storm kill (33%/rank): next Stormbolt free. ICD 6s.

talents.name: Skybreak
talents.desc: CAPSTONE: placed storm ring, big hit + 50% slow 3s.

trees.name: Mirebloom
trees.lore: What pushes the blight back out of the mire.

talents.name: Mire Lessons
talents.desc: +0.4 mana regen per rank (+2.0 at max).

talents.name: Deep Roots
talents.desc: +2 stamina per rank.

talents.name: Fuller Bloom
talents.desc: Rejuvenation +1 heal/s per rank (7->12).

talents.name: Longer Season
talents.desc: Rejuvenation +15% duration per rank (6s->7.8s).

talents.name: Blightwarden
talents.desc: Poison/disease durations on you -10% per rank.

talents.name: Thorn Tithe
talents.desc: Thornroot +8% damage per rank.

talents.name: Green Clarity
talents.desc: On cast (4%/rank): next spell costs 0 mana. ICD 4s.

talents.name: Pact Vigor
talents.desc: Spirit Beast +8 hp per rank (42->58).

talents.name: The Wood Provides
talents.desc: Healing you cast +4% per rank.

talents.name: Waking Wrath
talents.desc: When your spell heals you: +6% damage dealt for 3s. ICD 3s.

talents.name: Second Sap
talents.desc: Below 35% hp when hit (33%/rank): free Rejuvenation. ICD 20s.

talents.name: Heartwood Bloom
talents.desc: CAPSTONE: ground bloom, 6s, heals you each tick.
